roa.docketEntryComment: /TN: SAMMY LEE MUMPHERY II/CAL: DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY//X: ON 09-21-11, THE ARREST IN THIS CASE WAS RULED A DETENTION ONLY,/X: THE DA REPRESENTS THAT THERE ARE NO OTHER FORECLUSIONS PREVENTING THE RETURNOF THE FIREARM TO THE DEFENDANT,/X: THE DEFENDANT WILL STIPULATE TO THE FORFEITURE OF THE AMMUNITION,/WIT SWORN: SAMMY LEE MUMPHERY II/X: THE COURTEXAMINES THE DEFENDANT RE ANY CRIMINAL RECORD AND IS SATISFIED THERE IS NOARREST HISTORY,/MO GRTD/CTORD: THE AMMUNITION WILL BE REMOVED BEFORE THEFIREARM AND MAGAZINES ARERETURNED TO THE DEFENDANT/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: THIS CASE WAS PREVIOUSLY DISCHARGED BY THE DA'S OFFICE, NO FUTURE DATES  /
